governing_requirement: Freeze the authority lattice for Mode A packages, operationally_certified_artifact, human/training truth, Mode B drafts, pseudo labels, machine candidates, derived/inpaint masks, and target/protected inputs; prove that operational certification cannot impersonate training/human truth, descendants and weak protected inputs cannot inflate authority, and the consumer cannot upgrade MaskFactory authority.

existing_enforcement.evidence: mask_acquisition_receipt schema and semantic validation map invalid/hypothesis/draft/qa_passed_noncertified/certified to closed operational truth labels and reject self-promotion into training gold.
receipt semantic validation rejects refinement, derived_union, inpaint_derivative, or projection authority above any parent without an eligible exact independent promotion certificate.
input-region semantics compare required_minimum_authority_state with observed authority and fail below-floor bindings.
the active semantic invariant profile defines invalid<hypothesis<draft<qa_passed_noncertified<certified and binds its validator identities.

missing_proof: No single closed executable lattice enumerates every required artifact class and its authority namespace, ceiling, allowed uses, promotion authority, and protected-input behavior.
Access mode and authority tier are not evaluated as explicitly orthogonal inputs by a standalone deterministic decision API.
Human/training truth must remain a separate non-comparable namespace rather than being ranked above or below operational exact-output authority.
Pseudo labels, autonomous training gold, human anchors, derived masks, inpaint masks, target inputs, and protected inputs do not share one closed transition matrix.
No standalone decision record binds the lattice policy hash, inputs, result, reasons, and deterministic canonical hash.
No explicit consumer-actor negative fixture proves that Main or another downstream consumer cannot upgrade producer-owned authority.
No exhaustive unknown-class, namespace-confusion, descendant-inflation, weak-protected-input, or illegal-promotion fixture set proves fail-closed totality.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement a closed, deterministic operational authority lattice and decision record without modifying the frozen v1 bridge wire contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Access mode is recorded separately from authority and never grants authority by itself.
Operational exact-output certification cannot become or impersonate autonomous/human training gold.
Human/training truth is a separate namespace and cannot be compared as a stronger operational rank.
Raw Mode B results remain draft or machine-candidate authority until an independent exact-output certification transaction covers the exact original output.
Pseudo, derived, refinement, projection, and inpaint descendants cannot exceed the minimum authority ceiling of all parents.
Target and protected inputs enforce declared authority floors; a weak protected input blocks rather than being silently upgraded.
Only an authorized MaskFactory producer transition may grant or revoke mask authority; consumer and LLM actors may reject but cannot upgrade.
Every unknown class, namespace, transition, actor, access mode, or authority value fails closed with a deterministic typed reason.
The decision record binds policy identity/hash, exact normalized inputs, decision, reasons, and canonical content hash.
Frozen v1 wire schema bytes and the 12-contract catalog remain unchanged.

excluded_dirty_path.reason: The main worktree contains a separate frozen 08.05 one-line schema-registration change; it was inspected only for existing behavior and is not an allowed 09.03 path.
